step_rationale: Primary anticoagulant; decreased AT-III signals coagulation activation and heparin resistance.
mechanism: Antithrombin III consumption during MI reflects thrombin and Factor Xa generation; low AT-III impairs anticoagulation and predicts thrombotic burden.

references.title: Molecular regulation of coagulation by heparin-bound plasma Latexin.
C-reactive protein, prothrombotic imbalance and endothelial dysfunction in acute coronary syndromes without ST elevation.
references.journal: Romanian journal of internal medicine = Revue roumaine de medecine interne
